claim: Flash decorator (@flash.endpoint) enables hot-reload deployment of GPU functions from IDE; model swap is one line of code instead of container rebuild.
actionable: Use Flash SDK to eliminate Docker rebuild cycles during model iteration; test model swaps locally before deployment.
source_title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE

claim: H100 GPU pricing on RunPod serverless is $0.00116 per second, charged only during request handling; not during idle time.
actionable: Estimate serverless GPU costs by computing request duration; switch to serverless for variable workloads over reserved pods.
source_title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE

claim: RunPod recommends pods for early experimentation (low worker count), serverless when scaling to hundreds of workers across datacenters.
actionable: Start with pods during development; migrate to serverless only when you need multi-region autoscaling.
source_title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE

claim: Flash enables chaining multiple models (Qwen for prompting, DreamShaper for rendering, Nano Banana for composition) in single pipeline without container rebuilds.
actionable: Use Flash to orchestrate multi-model pipelines for image generation workflows with minimal deployment friction.
source_title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE

claim: RunPod infrastructure spans 30+ datacenters across 10 countries with 500+ developers and $120M annual recurring revenue.
actionable: Consider RunPod for global GPU availability if you need multi-region deployment with single provider.
source_title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE
